Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 300}You may sometimes have the opportunity to spend time with your friends separate from Social Links.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}By doing so, you will be able to grow closer to and learn more about them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Spending time with them can lead to other opportunities to hang out later, so be proactive about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Ignoring these relationships will {f 0 1 2}stunt their growth{f 0 1 27}, so make sure to show your friends you value them.[n]{f 1 1}
